name: Beaullieu Park
description: Come play pickleball at Beaullieu Park in Lafayette, LA! There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like food, restrooms, and water.

name: City Club at River Ranch
description: This is a members-only private club

name: Community Honda Pickleball Center
description: Community Honda Pickleball Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Youngsville, LA. There are 8 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. You can reserve the courts. Players have access to lights and restrooms.

name: George Dupuis Recreation Center
description: George Dupuis Recreation Center is a place to play pickleball in Lafayette, LA. There are 5 concrete courts. 3 are indoors and 2 are outdoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms and water.

name: Lafayette Pickleball Club
description:
These 6 indoor courts have an upgraded outdoor court surface called CushionX, a gritty surface with a special thin layer of cushion beneath it that helps prevent injury & reduces recovery time with no negative impact on the ball bounce. These courts are also generously spaced out with extra space behind the base line.

The facility uses CourtReserve to reserve courts & register for events such as Open Play.

name: Le Triomphe Golf and Country Club
description: Le Triomphe Golf and Country Club is a place to play pickleball in Broussard, LA. There are 6 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play.

name: Oakbourne Country Club
description: Oakbourne Country Club is a place to play pickleball in Lafayette, LA. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms, lights, and a pro shop or equipment store. A membership is required to play.

name: Red Lerille's Health & Racquet Club
description: Red Lerille's Health & Racquet Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Lafayette, LA. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like food, a pro shop or equipment store, restrooms, water, and lights. A membership is required to play.

name: Thomas Park Recreation Center
description: Come play pickleball at Thomas Park Recreation Center in Lafayette, LA! There are 3 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms, food, water, and lights. The courts are free. Reservations are not available.

name: Youngsville Sport Complex
description: Youngsville Sport Complex is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Youngsville, LA. There are 6 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts can be reserved. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like food, restrooms, water, lights, and wheelchair accessibility.
